word: G889 - ἀχρειόω - achreióō - akh-ri-o'-o - Become unprofitable

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἀχρειόω

- Transliteration: Achreioo

- Phonetic: akh-ri-o'-o

- Definition:

1. make useless, render unserviceable

a. of character

- Origin: from G888

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G888; to render useless that is spoil: - become unprofitable.
